events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: this is a critical PPE failure — voltage-rated gloves with either an incorrect class for the system voltage or an expired ASTM F496/OSHA 1910.137 retest date (or both). Marked `fail`, risk `critical`, with corrective actions to quarantine the gloves, verify the correct class against NFPA 70E Table 130.7(C)(7)(c), and get them retested before any energized work proceeds.
